title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our platform team. You will be responsible for building scalable microservices that power our consumer-facing products.
raw_text:
Senior Backend Engineer - TechCorp India

Location: Bangalore (Hybrid)
Experience: 4-6 years

About the Role:
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our platform team. You will be responsible for building scalable microservices that power our consumer-facing products.

Requirements:
- 4-6 years of experience in backend development
- Strong proficiency in Python (Django/FastAPI) or Java (Spring Boot)
- Experience with microservices architecture
- Knowledge of PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka
- Experience with AWS/GCP cloud platforms
- Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes

Nice to Have:
- Experience in fintech or payment systems
- Knowledge of event-driven architectures
- Experience with GraphQL

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement scalable backend services
- Collaborate with product and design teams
- Write clean, testable code
- Participate in code reviews and mentoring
- Contribute to technical architecture decisions

Compensation:
₹25L - ₹40L per annum

Benefits:
- Hybrid work model
- Health insurance
- Learning budget

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our AI team to build and deploy machine learning models at scale. You will work on recommendation systems, NLP pipelines, and computer vision applications.
raw_text:
Machine Learning Engineer - AI Innovations

Location: Remote
Experience: 2-5 years

About the Role:
Join our AI team to build and deploy machine learning models at scale. You will work on recommendation systems, NLP pipelines, and computer vision applications.

Requirements:
- 2-5 years of experience in ML engineering
- Strong Python skills
- Experience with TensorFlow or PyTorch
- Knowledge of ML lifecycle and MLOps
- Familiarity with cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI)
- Strong understanding of ML algorithms and statistics

Nice to Have:
- Experience with recommendation systems
- Knowledge of NLP transformers
- Experience with vector databases

Responsibilities:
- Build and productionize ML models
- Design feature engineering pipelines
- Optimize model performance
- Collaborate with data engineers and product teams

Compensation:
₹20L - ₹35L per annum

Benefits:
- Fully remote
- Flexible hours
- Conference attendance

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: We are seeking a Full Stack Engineer to build our next-generation SaaS platform. You will work across the stack from database to UI, collaborating closely with our product team.
raw_text:
Full Stack Engineer - StartupX

Location: Pune (On-site)
Experience: 3-5 years

About the Role:
We are seeking a Full Stack Engineer to build our next-generation SaaS platform. You will work across the stack from database to UI, collaborating closely with our product team.

Requirements:
- 3-5 years of full stack development experience
- Proficiency in React and TypeScript
- Node.js or Python backend experience
- Experience with PostgreSQL and MongoDB
- Knowledge of REST and GraphQL APIs
- Familiarity with Git and CI/CD pipelines

Nice to Have:
- Experience building SaaS products
- Knowledge of authentication (OAuth, JWT)
- Experience with testing frameworks

Responsibilities:
- Develop features end-to-end
- Write clean, maintainable code
- Participate in agile ceremonies
- Mentor junior developers

Compensation:
₹18L - ₹28L per annum

Benefits:
- On-site work
- Stock options
- Team building activities
